import json

from gateway_runtime import GatewayRuntime
from settings_store import SettingsStore


def write_config(path, payload):
    path.write_text(json.dumps(payload), encoding="utf-8")


def test_removed_override_returns_to_default_after_reload(tmp_path):
    path = tmp_path / "gateway.json"
    write_config(path, {"api_prefix": "/temporary", "request_timeout": 15})
    runtime = GatewayRuntime(SettingsStore(path))

    write_config(path, {"request_timeout": 7})
    runtime.reload()

    assert runtime.endpoint_for("health") == "/api/health"
    assert runtime.request_timeout == 7


def test_empty_replacement_config_clears_all_previous_overrides(tmp_path):
    path = tmp_path / "gateway.json"
    write_config(path, {"api_prefix": "/partner", "request_timeout": 30})
    runtime = GatewayRuntime(SettingsStore(path))

    write_config(path, {})
    runtime.reload()

    assert runtime.endpoint_for("accounts") == "/api/accounts"
    assert runtime.request_timeout == 5


def test_store_reload_itself_drops_an_absent_override(tmp_path):
    path = tmp_path / "gateway.json"
    write_config(path, {"request_timeout": 21})
    store = SettingsStore(path)

    write_config(path, {})
    store.reload()

    assert store.request_timeout == 5
